summary: Completed e2e testing of TrendScout SaaS growth upgrade features: (1) Viral Leaderboard at /top-trending-products (public, 50 products ranked by launch_score), (2) AI Ad Creative Generator using GPT 5.2 (returns 3 TikTok ad concepts with scenes/hooks), (3) Fixed 61 broken product images (no '01jrA-8DXYL' placeholders), (4) PublicProductPage share menu with LinkedIn/Reddit, (5) JSON-LD structured data for SEO, (6) TrendTimeline and AdCreativeGenerator components on ProductDetailPage. ALL 15 backend tests PASSED. ALL frontend components verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/top-trending returns 200
Backend: Top trending returns 50 products
Backend: Products have required fields (rank, id, slug, product_name, margin_percent, tiktok_views, launch_score)
Backend: Products ranked by launch_score in descending order
Backend: No broken Amazon placeholder images (01jrA-8DXYL) in top trending
Backend: Products have valid URL slugs
Backend: GET /api/ad-tests/ad-creatives/{product_id} requires authentication (401)
Backend: Ad creatives returns 200 with valid auth
Backend: Ad creatives returns 3 TikTok ad concepts
Backend: Each ad creative has type, hook, scenes (3+), music_style, estimated_engagement
Backend: Ad creatives response includes product_id, product_name, ai_powered flag
Backend: Ad creatives returns 404 for invalid product
Backend: GET /api/public/product/{slug} returns product data
Backend: Most products have images (50/50 have image_url)
Backend: Image URLs use valid sources (Unsplash, API)
Frontend: /top-trending-products renders leaderboard with trophy icon and score legend
Frontend: Leaderboard shows ranked products with images, margins, competition
Frontend: Navigation 'Leaderboard' link works from header
Frontend: No broken placeholder images visible on leaderboard UI
Frontend: /p/:id (PublicProductPage) has Share button with dropdown menu
Frontend: Share menu includes Twitter/X, Facebook, LinkedIn, Reddit, WhatsApp, Copy Link
Frontend: PublicProductPage has JSON-LD structured data (@type: Product with offers, aggregateRating)
Frontend: /product/:id shows TrendTimeline component (data-testid='trend-timeline')
Frontend: /product/:id shows AdCreativeGenerator component (data-testid='ad-creative-generator')
Frontend: AdCreativeGenerator has 'Generate 3 TikTok Ad Concepts' button
Frontend: /trending-products shows real product images (48 Unsplash, 7 API images)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TrendScout growth upgrade features fully tested: (1) GET /api/public/top-trending is PUBLIC - returns 50 products ranked by launch_score with rank, id, slug, product_name, margin_percent, tiktok_views, launch_score. (2) GET /api/ad-tests/ad-creatives/{product_id} requires auth - uses GPT 5.2 via emergentintegrations, returns 3 TikTok ad concepts with type, hook, scenes array, music_style, estimated_engagement. Takes 10-15 seconds. (3) Broken Amazon placeholder images (01jrA-8DXYL.gif) were fixed - now using Unsplash images by category. (4) PublicProductPage at /p/:id has share menu with LinkedIn/Reddit options, JSON-LD structured data. (5) TrendingProductPage at /trending/:slug shows product details with SEO. (6) ProductDetailPage at /product/:id includes TrendTimeline (data-testid='trend-timeline') and AdCreativeGenerator (data-testid='ad-creative-generator') components. (7) Leaderboard link in LandingLayout nav works.

Viral Leaderboard API.details: Returns 50 products ranked by launch_score with rank, slug, margin_percent, tiktok_views

AI Ad Creative Generator API.details: Returns 3 TikTok ad concepts with type, hook, scenes, music_style

Fixed Broken Images.details: 61 Amazon placeholder images fixed, now using Unsplash URLs by category. No 01jrA-8DXYL in image URLs

Top Trending Leaderboard Page.details: Trophy icon, score legend badges (Viral 85+, Strong 70+, Emerging 50+, Weak 30+, Dead 0+), ranked product list

PublicProductPage Share Menu.details: Share dropdown with Twitter/X, Facebook, LinkedIn, Reddit, WhatsApp, Copy Link

JSON-LD Structured Data.details: @type: Product with name, offers (price, currency), aggregateRating

TrendTimeline Component.details: 7-day trend chart with score, TikTok views, Google trend metrics

AdCreativeGenerator Component.details: Generate 3 TikTok Ad Concepts button, expandable ad scripts with scenes

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - Ad Creative Generator uses real GPT 5.2 via emergentintegrations
